name: knight-attack
_comment: A 4-frame overhead sword swing. The body re-poses by small offsets (lean back -> lean in -> settle), but the real motion is the SWORD layer, present in every frame: at rest, raised overhead (windup), rotated 90 into a horizontal chop with a flash swoosh (strike), then lowered (recover). The swing is the engine's `rotate` transform doing the work, not a redraw. Uses a per-sprite 24x24 canvas so the swing has room — the bible's other sprites stay 16x16.
